positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
2. held_in(last_summer_olympics,tokyo) [input(axiom)]
3. won_most_medals_in(united_states,tokyo) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((held_in(X0,X1) & won_most_medals_in(X2,X1)) => won_most_medals_in(X2,X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. won_most_medals_in(united_states,last_summer_olympics) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~won_most_medals_in(united_states,last_summer_olympics) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~won_most_medals_in(united_states,last_summer_olympics) [flattening 7]
10. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (won_most_medals_in(X2,X0) | (~held_in(X0,X1) | ~won_most_medals_in(X2,X1))) [ennf transformation 5]
11. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (won_most_medals_in(X2,X0) | ~held_in(X0,X1) | ~won_most_medals_in(X2,X1)) [flattening 10]
12. held_in(last_summer_olympics,tokyo) [cnf transformation 2]
13. won_most_medals_in(united_states,tokyo) [cnf transformation 3]
20. ~won_most_medals_in(X2,X1) | ~held_in(X0,X1) | won_most_medals_in(X2,X0) [cnf transformation 11]
21. ~won_most_medals_in(united_states,last_summer_olympics) [cnf transformation 8]
22. ~held_in(X0,tokyo) | won_most_medals_in(united_states,X0) [resolution 20,13]
23. won_most_medals_in(united_states,last_summer_olympics) [resolution 22,12]
24. $false [forward subsumption resolution 23,21]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
